SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap

Class BungeeBootstrap.Builder

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
Enclosing class:
BungeeBootstrap
public static final class BungeeBootstrap.Builder extends Object
Builder for wiring MagicUtils services on BungeeCord.
